title: Argentinian Empanadas
description: Traditional Argentinian empanadas filled with beef and spices, perfect for a snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: Argentinian seasoned beef
ingredients.notes: Ground beef with paprika, garlic, and cumin

instructions: Roll out the pillowy dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a tablespoon of the Argentinian seasoned beef in the center of each dough circle.
Top with a sprinkle of breadcrumbs.
Fold the dough in half and press the edges to seal.
Brush the tops with egg wash.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
